creator: bsd@rothert.org
text:
Created attachment 245762
patch upgrade n2n-3.0.0 plus rc, docs and tap interface naming

Patch to upgrade to n2n 3.0.0 (stable)

This patch includes rc scripts for the edge and supernode daemons and adds n2n's sample and documentation files to the package.

I have patched tuntap_freebsd.c to support tap interface naming like in Linux.
Use e.g. "-d=n2n_home" to create an "n2n_home" edge interface.
